name: csa-shader-bundle
description: Dev-only tool. Pre-bundles React 18 + @paper-design/shaders-react into ../../public/csa/vendor/paper-shaders.bundle.js so the design-system WebGL shaders load from our own origin instead of a third-party CDN (esm.sh/jsdelivr) at runtime. NOT part of the Next/Docker build — the committed bundle ships as a static asset. Regenerate with: npm install && node build.mjs
